*Example output generated by design-scan from https://stripe.com — screenshots not included in the repo.*

# Design Spec: Stripe (stripe.com)

## Overview
Stripe presents as a **light, editorial, high-trust fintech** brand. The canvas is
predominantly white (`#ffffff`) and near-white (`#f6f9fc`, `#fafbfd`), with body
copy set in a cool desaturated slate (`#425466`, the single most-used color at
1544 occurrences) and headings in a deep navy (`#0a2540` / `#061b31`). The one
loud gesture is a signature **prismatic gradient "flame"** — magenta → orange →
periwinkle → violet — that sweeps diagonally through the hero and reappears as
angled color bands on the pricing and contact pages. Personality is confident and
restrained: light font weights (body and headings both render at weight **300**),
generous whitespace, tight heading letter-spacing, and motion that is quick and
functional rather than showy. Density is low-to-medium on marketing pages (big
type, lots of air) and rises into dense data tables and dark-navy panels deeper
down the home page. Overall mood: premium, engineered, calm.

## Layout System
- **Max content width:** the dominant container caps at **1266px** (7 occurrences);
  secondary rails at **856px** (×2), plus one-off **1298px**, **688px**, **516px**
  containers. The marketing layout system additionally defines
  `--layoutWidthMax: 1080px` with a 16px gutter (`--gutterWidth: 16px`), so most
  hero/section copy lives inside ~1080px while full-bleed graphics run to 1266px.
- **Grid vs flex:** heavily flex-driven — **240 flex sections** vs **29 grid
  sections** across **15 top-level sections**. The marketing grid is a 4-column
  system (`--hds-space-layout-columns: 4`; `--hds-canary-grid-span-full: span 4`);
  the "Flexible solutions" bento uses a mixed 1-up / 3-up card grid.
- **Header:** height **76px** (`--navigation-height: 76px`), `position: relative`,
  **not sticky** (`sticky: false`), and **fully transparent** background
  (`rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)`) so the hero gradient shows through beneath it.
- **Vertical rhythm:** section padding is large — marketing sections use
  `--paddingTop / --paddingBottom: 160px`; the HDS scale sets
  `--hds-space-section-gap-top/bottom: 56px` (`core-700`). Row gaps step through
  8 / 24 / 32 / 64 / 88px (`--rowGapNormal…XXLarge`).
- **Spacing scale:** an 8px-based core scale with 2px/4px/6px sub-steps —
  `--hds-space-core-*`: 0, 1, 2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32, 36, 40, 44, 48,
  56, 64 … up to 200px.
- **Corner radius:** small and crisp. Histogram of rendered radii: **1px ×31**,
  **6px ×30**, **4px ×21**, **5px ×6**, `6px 6px 0 0 ×3`. Token scale: xs 2px,
  sm 4px, md 6px, lg 16px, xl 32px, round 99999px.

## Typography
Base font size is **16px**. Family is Söhne (variable) with an SF Pro / system
fallback. Note the unusually **light default weights**: `--hds-font-weight-normal: 300`
and `--hds-font-weight-bold: 400` — Stripe sets both body and most headings at 300,
using 400 only for emphasis. The marketing hero uses `--titleWeight: 425`.

| Role | Family | Size | Weight | Line height | Letter spacing |
|------|--------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|
| Display / marketing hero | sohne-var | 2.125rem / 34px base, viewport-scaled up on desktop (`--hero-font-lang-large`, `--viewportScale`) | 425 (`--titleWeight`) | ~1.03–1.1 | -0.01 to -0.02em |
| Heading XXL / H1 (HDS) | sohne-var | 2.125rem / 34px (`--hds-font-heading-xxl-size`) | 300 | 1.03 | -0.02em |
| Heading XL / H2 | sohne-var | 1.75rem / 28px (`--hds-font-heading-xl`) | 300 | 1.07 | -0.01em |
| Heading LG / H3 | sohne-var | 1.375rem / 22px (`--hds-font-heading-lg`) | 300 | 1.2 | -0.01em |
| Heading MD (bento card title) | sohne-var | 1.25rem / 20px (`--hds-font-heading-md`) | 300 | 1.2 | -0.01em |
| Body LG | sohne-var | 1rem / 16px (`--hds-font-text-lg`) | 300 | 1.35 | 0em |
| Body MD (default) | sohne-var | 1rem / 16px (`--hds-font-text-md`) | 300 | 1.4 | 0em |
| Caption / small (`text-xs`/`xxs`) | sohne-var | 0.75rem / 12px | 300 | 1.45 | 0em |
| CTA / button label | sohne-var | 14px / 1.6 (`--ctaFont`) | semibold (~600) | 1.6 | — |
| Code / mono | SourceCodePro | — | 500 | — | — |

**Font loading:** self-hosted `@font-face`, not Google Fonts. Two families load
from a single Stripe CDN stylesheet:
`https://b.stripecdn.com/mkt-statics-srv/assets/v1-fonts-79c606a1251d238d4708.css`.
Loaded faces: **sohne-var** (variable axis `1 1000`, style normal) and
**SourceCodePro** (weight 500). Declared stacks:
`--hds-font-family: "sohne-var","SF Pro Display",sans-serif` and
`--hds-font-family-code: "SourceCodePro","SFMono-Regular",monospace`.

Ranked by rendered usage count (`colorPalette`):

| Swatch (hex) | Role | Usage count | Notes |
|--------------|------|-------------|-------|
| `#425466` | Text (body) | 1544 | Signature Stripe cool-slate body copy |
| `#000000` | Text | 742 | Pure black, headings/UI |
| `#0a2540` | Text | 719 | Deep navy — primary heading ink |
| `#533afd` | Text / brand | 693 | Brand-600 violet (primary action) |
| `#061b31` | Text | 218 | Near-black navy (`--hds-color-text-solid`, neutral-990) |
| `#635bff` | Text / brand | 200 | Classic Stripe "blurple" (marketing accent/links) |
| `#ffffff` | Background | 193 | Primary canvas |
| `#50617a` | Text | 103 | Neutral-600 muted text |
| `#64748d` | Text | 80 | Neutral-500 subdued text |
| `#727f96` | Text | 77 | Muted label gray |
| `#3f4b66` | Text | 73 | — |
| `#3c4f69` | Text | 64 | Neutral-700 |
| `#707f98` | Text | 55 | — |
| `#e5edf5` | Border | 44 | Neutral-50 hairline dividers |
| `#f6f9fc` | Background | 31 | Light section tint |
| `#e7ecf1` | Border | 22 | Card/hairline borders |
| `#667691` | Text | 20 | — |
| `#ff6118` | Text / accent | 19 | Orange-350 accent (gradient) |
| `rgba(66,71,112,0.06)` | Background | 18 | Faint tinted surface |
| `#273951` | Text | 16 | Neutral-800 |
| `#fafbfd` | Background | 15 | Near-white |
| `#0000ee` | Text | 15 | Default UA link blue (unstyled links) |
| `#1a2c44` | Text | 14 | Neutral-900 |
| `#0810bf` | Text | 13 | Deep indigo |

**Signature gradient** (hero flame + angled page bands):
`--accent-gradient-color-stop-1: #bdb4ff` → `--accent-gradient-color-stop-2: #643afd`
→ `--accent-gradient-color-stop-3: #533afd`, layered with orange/magenta
(`#ff6118`, magenta-350 `#f44bcc`) for the prismatic sweep seen in the hero.

### Design tokens (CSS custom properties)
| Token | Value | Role |
|-------|-------|------|
| `--navigation-height` | 76px | Header height |
| `--navigation-easing` | cubic-bezier(0.45,0.05,0.55,0.95) | Nav transition easing |
| `--navigation-duration` | 240ms | Nav transition (300ms slow variant) |
| `--hds-font-family` | "sohne-var","SF Pro Display",sans-serif | Base font stack |
| `--hds-font-weight-normal` / `-bold` | 300 / 400 | Default / emphasis weight |
| `--hds-color-core-brand-600` | #533afd | Primary brand / action bg |
| `--hds-color-core-brand-700` | #4032c8 | Brand hover (action-bg-solidHover) |
| `--hds-color-action-bg-solid` | var(brand-600) → #533afd | Primary button bg |
| `--hds-color-text-solid` | var(neutral-990) → #061b31 | Solid text |
| `--hds-color-text-soft` | var(neutral-600) → #50617a | Secondary text |
| `--hds-color-surface-bg-subdued` | var(neutral-25) → #f8fafd | Subtle section bg |
| `--hds-space-button-height` | 44px (`core-550`) | Button/input min-height |
| `--hds-space-core-radius-sm` / `-lg` | 4px / 16px | Button / card radius |
| `--hds-shadow-xl` (top) | 0 20px 80px -16px rgba(0,55,112,.14) | Elevated card shadow |
| `--layoutWidthMax` | 1080px | Marketing content max width |
| `--paddingTop` / `--paddingBottom` | 160px | Marketing section padding |
| `--accent-gradient-color-stop-1/2/3` | #bdb4ff / #643afd / #533afd | Hero gradient stops |
| `--ctaFont` | 600 14px/1.6 var(--fontFamily) | CTA label typography |
| `--titleWeight` | 425 | Marketing hero weight |

## Components
Inventory: **107 buttons**, **204 inputs**, **45 cards**, **14 badges**,
**63 accordions**, **207 carousel elements**, **1 video embed**, **10 iframes**,
**0 tables**, **0 modals**.

- **Nav bar** (`home/desktop.png`, `home/mobile.png`) — 76px tall, transparent over
  the hero, left wordmark ("stripe") + Products / Solutions / Developers / Resources
  dropdowns + Pricing; right side "Sign in" (ghost) and "Contact sales" (solid violet,
  pill/rounded, caret icon). Collapses to a single hamburger button on mobile
  (`--navigation-hamburger-duration: 0.25s`).
- **Primary button** — bg `--hds-color-action-bg-solid` = `#533afd`, text white
  (`action-text-onSolid`), radius **4px** (`button-radius-lg` → `radius-sm`),
  1px border, height 44px. Hover → `#4032c8` (brand-700). Marketing "Get started"
  variant reads as the brighter blurple `#635bff` with a trailing "›" caret.
  (`home/desktop.png`)
- **Secondary button** — transparent bg, 1px `action-border-quiet` (brand-100)
  border, brand-600 text; "Sign up with Google" pairs the Google glyph on a white
  outlined pill. (`home/desktop.png`)
- **Hero** (`home/desktop.png`) — left-aligned eyebrow "Global GDP running on
  Stripe: 1.676…%", oversized light-weight headline with a two-tone treatment
  (navy → violet on "your revenue"), CTA pair below, and the prismatic gradient
  occupying the right ~55% of the frame. Logo strip (OpenAI, Amazon, NVIDIA, Ford,
  Coinbase, Google, Shopify…) sits directly beneath.
- **Bento solution cards** (`home/scroll-02.png`) — white rounded cards on a light
  canvas, each with a title, an expand icon (top-right), and a rich product
  visual (phone checkout, billing meter with violet→magenta gradient bar, usage
  bar chart). Radius ~6px; hover reveals an animated gradient border and shifts
  the title (see Animation & Motion).
- **Pricing cards** (`en-my-pricing/desktop.png`) — a light "Standard" card
  (3% + RM1.00 pricing, "Get started" pill) sits beside a **dark-navy "Custom"
  card** with a segmented list (IC+ pricing / Volume discounts / Multi-product
  discounts / Country-specific rates) and a cyan "Contact sales" pill; a floating
  pill tab bar (Standard pricing / Custom pricing / FAQs) overlaps the section
  seam, all crossed by an angled gradient band.
- **Form / stepper** (`en-my-contact-sales/desktop.png`) — centered white card
  with `--hds-shadow` elevation on a `#f8fafd` canvas, a 3-step progress indicator
  (Your email / Your info / Let's talk) with a violet fill bar, labeled inputs
  (focused input shows a blue ring), a native select, and a violet "Continue" pill.
- **Dark feature banner** (`home/scroll-04.png`) — full-width "Building the economic
  infrastructure for AI" panel: dark stage photo with the prismatic-lit backdrop,
  white headline, white "Watch now" pill, "stripe sessions" lockup bottom-right.
- **Data table / customer rows** (`home/scroll-04.png`) — dense billing table
  (avatar, name, country, two MYR columns); note component inventory reports
  `tables: 0`, so these render as flex/grid rows, not `<table>`.
- **Footer** — `footerGroupCount: 0` was reported (the crawler did not resolve
  discrete footer column groups); the fullpage screenshot shows a standard
  multi-column link footer at the base (`home/fullpage.png`).

## Animation & Motion
**Libraries detected: none — CSS only.** Every animation library probe is `false`
(no GSAP, ScrollTrigger, Framer Motion, Lottie, AOS, Anime.js, Swiper, Lenis,
Locomotive, Barba, Rive). All motion is CSS `@keyframes` + `transition` + the Web
Animations API. Note: the captured `waapi` set is entirely **hover-triggered** nav
arrows, not scroll-triggered — there is no scroll-linked JS motion.

**Web Animations API (live):** 30 captured instances, all identical —
- **`refreshed-nav-hover-arrow-out`** / target `svg.RefreshedHoverArrow.RefreshedNavItem__arrow`
  — trigger **hover** (out); duration **150ms**, delay **0**, timing easing
  `linear`, keyframe easing `cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1)`, `fill: forwards`,
  1 iteration. Keyframes: `0%: opacity 1 → 100%: opacity 0`. Paired in CSS with
  `nav-hover-arrow-in` (`0%: opacity 0, translateX(-3px) → 100%: opacity 1,
  translateX(0)`) for the nav-item caret that slides in on hover.

**Key CSS `@keyframes`:**
- **`bento-dialog-reveal-fade-in-up`** (bento card expand, `scroll-02.png`) —
  `0%: opacity 0, translate3d(0, 30px, 0) → 100%: opacity 1, translateZ(0)`.
- **`bento-overlay-gradient-opacity-animation`** — `0%: opacity 0 → 100%: opacity 1`
  (gradient border/overlay fade-in on the solution cards).
- **`agentic-commerce-graphic-border-spin`** / **`glow`** — a rotating conic border:
  `0%: translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(0deg) → 100%: translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(1turn)`.
- **`opacityAnimation`** — background wash `rgba(229,237,245,0) → rgba(229,237,245,.9)`.
- **`loadChatBubble` / `loadChatBox`** — `0%: opacity 0, translateY(30px) scale(0.5)
  → 100%: opacity 1, translateY(0) scale(1)` (chat widget entrance).
- **`UniversalChatTypingBubbleBounce`** — `0%,100%: translateY(2px) (ease-out) →
  50%: translateY(-2.5px) (ease-in-out)` typing-dot bounce.
- **`UniversalChatCtaCard__entrance`** — `0%: opacity 0, translateY(16px) → 100%:
  opacity 1, translateY(0)`; **`__exit`** → `translateY(0) → translateY(8px)`,
  opacity 1→0; **`__bodyExit`** → `rotate(0) scale(1) → rotate(15deg) scale(0)`.
- **`book-of-the-week-fade-in`** — `opacity 0 → 1`.
- **`blink`** — caret blink `0%,50%: opacity 0; 51%,100%: opacity 1`.

**Transition conventions** (from `transitions`):
- **Nav links / triggers:** `opacity` (and `color, background-color, border-color`)
  over **0.24s** with `cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95)` (the
  `--navigation-easing`).
- **Primary button & `hds-link`:** `background-color, color, border` /
  `color` over **0.3s** with `cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1)` (a fast-out ease).
- **Site-header nav items:** `opacity, color, background-color, border, fill,
  stroke` over **0.3s** `cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1)`.
- **CtaButton / pricing / breadcrumb links:** **0.15s**
  `cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1)` (ease-out-cubic) — the snappy marketing
  interaction curve.
- **Bento card reveal:** `transform` and `clip-path` over **0.8s**
  `cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1)` (ease-out-quart) for the dialog-entry and
  title shift; the border-color gradient sweeps `transform` over **1s**
  `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` (ease-out-expo). Card z-index swaps instantly
  via `0.1s steps(1)`.
- **Video overlay:** `opacity` over **0.5s** `ease`.

**Hover states** (from `hoverStyles`):
- **Nav link hover:** text color → `--hds-color-text-solid` (`#061b31`); non-hovered
  sibling triggers dim to `--hds-color-text-subdued`.
- **Bento solution card hover:** gradient border `opacity → 1`, title
  `transform: translate(var(--card-shift-x), var(--card-shift-y))`, the dialog-entry
  icon translates opposite, and `clip-path: inset(0 round …)` opens the rounded
  border — the composed "card lifts and glows" effect.
- **Customer-story button hover:** fills to `color:#fff`, `background: action-bg-solid`
  (brand-600), `border: 1px solid #533afd`.
- **Sessions CTA hover:** color → `--hds-color-util-brand-975` (deep indigo).
- **"Book" button hover:** `border-color → --hds-color-util-neutral-200` (`#bac8da`).
- **Sent-message link hover:** `opacity: .6`.

## Responsive Behavior
Marketing breakpoints are defined as `--viewportWidthSmall: 375`,
`--viewportWidthMedium: 600`, `--viewportWidthLarge: 1112`, with the hero scaling
fluidly via `--viewportScale: calc(windowWidth / 1112)`.

- **Mobile (~390px, `home/mobile.png`):** the full nav collapses to a single
  boxed **hamburger** button (`--navigation-hamburger-duration: 0.25s`); the
  wordmark stays left. The hero headline reflows to ~2–3 lines and shrinks; the
  two CTAs (**Get started**, **Sign up with Google**) become **full-width, stacked**
  pills. The customer logo strip becomes a **horizontally scrolling** row
  (OpenAI / amazon / NVIDIA partly clipped at the right edge). Bento solution
  cards stack to a single column.
- **Tablet (~768px):** not directly captured under the token-discipline read set
  (home reads were desktop + mobile + fullpage only; the tablet frame was not
  opened). Inferred from the 600/1112 breakpoints: nav likely still collapsed or
  condensed, hero copy near full-width within the 1080px cap, and the bento grid
  dropping from 3-up to 2-up before going 1-up on mobile.
- **Desktop (1440px, `home/desktop.png`):** full horizontal nav, hero on the left
  half with the gradient occupying the right, 3-up/2-up bento grid, and content
  centered within the ~1266px container.

- **Newsroom (OpenAI Instant Checkout):**
  `design-scan-output/stripe.com/pages/en-my-newsroom-news-stripe-openai-instant-checkout/desktop.png`.
- **og:image:** `https://images.stripeassets.com/fzn2n1nzq965/XtX984S1GJVsVOXFC7kMu/01988281e867728dfb09aa7793a6e3b9/Stripe.jpg?q=80`
- **favicon:** `https://images.stripeassets.com/fzn2n1nzq965/1hgcBNd12BfT9VLgbId7By/01d91920114b124fb4cf6d448f9f06eb/favicon.svg` (SVG)
- **theme-color:** none set (`themeColor: null`); **lang:** `en-MY`;
  **viewport:** `width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover`.

## Implementation Notes
Recommended stack: **Next.js + Tailwind**, self-hosting Söhne (or a close
substitute like Inter/Geist at weight 300 with `letter-spacing: -0.01em` on
headings to mimic the light, tight Stripe look). No animation library is needed —
match Stripe's own approach with **CSS transitions + `@keyframes`** and small WAAPI
touches; the durations/easings below reproduce the observed motion exactly.

```js
// tailwind.config.js (excerpt)
export default {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        ink:      '#061b31', // text-solid / neutral-990
        heading:  '#0a2540',
        body:     '#425466', // signature slate
        muted:    '#50617a', // neutral-600
        subtle:   '#64748d', // neutral-500
        brand:    { DEFAULT: '#533afd', 600: '#533afd', 700: '#4032c8' },
        blurple:  '#635bff', // marketing accent
        surface:  { DEFAULT: '#ffffff', subdued: '#f8fafd', tint: '#f6f9fc' },
        hairline: '#e5edf5',
        accent:   { orange: '#ff6118', magenta: '#f44bcc' },
      },
      fontFamily: {
        sans: ['sohne-var', 'SF Pro Display', 'system-ui', 'sans-serif'],
        mono: ['SourceCodePro', 'SFMono-Regular', 'monospace'],
      },
      fontWeight: { normal: '300', medium: '425', semibold: '600', bold: '400' },
      borderRadius: { xs: '2px', sm: '4px', md: '6px', lg: '16px', xl: '32px' },
      maxWidth: { content: '1080px', wide: '1266px' },
      boxShadow: {
        card: '0 20px 80px -16px rgba(0,55,112,.14)',        // --hds-shadow-xl
        float: '0 30px 60px -10px rgba(50,50,93,.25), 0 30px 60px -50px rgba(0,0,0,.1)',
      },
      transitionTimingFunction: {
        nav:  'cubic-bezier(0.45,0.05,0.55,0.95)', // 0.24s nav
        out:  'cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1)',        // 0.3s links/buttons
        cta:  'cubic-bezier(0.215,0.61,0.355,1)',  // 0.15s CTAs
        bento:'cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1)',   // 0.8s card reveal
      },
    },
  },
}
```

**Motion mapping:**
- Nav/link hover → `transition` 240ms `ease-nav` (opacity/color).
- Buttons & links → 300ms `ease-out`.
- Marketing CTAs (caret buttons) → 150ms `ease-cta`.
- Bento card reveal → `transform`/`clip-path` 800ms `ease-bento`, gradient border
  1000ms `cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)`; drive with a `bento-dialog-reveal-fade-in-up`
  keyframe (`opacity 0 + translateY(30px) → opacity 1 + translateY(0)`).
- Rotating gradient accents (agentic graphic) → infinite `rotate(1turn)` keyframe.
- Keep body/heading weight at 300, headings letter-spacing -0.01 to -0.02em, and
  reserve the prismatic gradient for one hero moment per page.
</content>
</invoke>
